tilt up live: postgres+api+web all healthy on :5432/:4201/:4200, Tilt UI :10350. Dashboard renders all 9 tiles 1:1 with the Evee Design, real data (weather/climate/controls/camera/events), Next 12 Hours bars verified rendering in cmux browser. Screenshot docs/screenshots/dashboard.png.

Code described in issue (discarded query) was already fixed in ffc593d. Real cause of live 24,113: sensor.evee_odometer was disabled-by-default in the Tesla HA integration, so the API correctly fell back. Enabled the entity via HA websocket entity_registry API + woke the car (button.evee_wake) -> odometer now reports 38,743 live through tesla.get. Also fixed a surfaced bug: odometer rendered '0' (not placeholder) when entity exists but state is unknown/unavailable; now degrades to placeholder + regression test added.
Shipped in 38b8118: header simplified to 'Tesla' + lock pill via shared TileHeader
Fixed: direct HA dispatch for unregistered devices
Implemented optimistic onMutate flip + revert/invalidate; tested
Real Open-Meteo hourly restored; real time labels
Real Open-Meteo hourly restored; real time labels

Shipped: live MapLibre + Protomaps pmtiles GPS map on TeslaTile, themed dark/green, verified live in-browser at 1366x1024. Merged to origin/main @2255f3d. Local SoCal pmtiles; homelab hosting + full CA/AZ/NV extent tracked by www-gma.
SSID corrected HomeNet->world-wide-webb in ae297fd, on main
Fixed in 55af050 (SecondsRing.tsx): wrap now snaps instantly.
Fixed in 55af050: stroke var(--ink-3) gray, 1s-linear transition for a smooth sweep, ref-based wrap detection drops the transition on 59->0 so it snaps instantly.
Generic BorderProgressRing + rAF-driven ClockSecondsRing: smooth sweep, instant wrap, any tile/size.
Charge bar + Range stat now key off charging state: green when charging, gray when idle. Stat gained reusable muted prop. Gates green (typecheck, 187 tests, biome).

Dropped onSettled:clearLocal from setTarget/setRange/setMode; cooldown-expiry effect is the single overlay-clear point and clears only after invalidate().then() lands. 3 climate regression tests (setpoint/range/mode) + 1 ControlsTile fan-parity test, all fail-before/pass-after. 538 tests green. Commit 8c6428e.

Replaced LOCATION_LABEL env var with config/places.ts (named places: name+lat/lon+radiusMiles). Haversine, first-within-radius-in-order wins; Home (1mi) seeded; falls back to HA zone title-cased, else '' (no fabricated label, empty pill hidden). LOCATION_LABEL removed from env entirely. places.test.ts + tesla.test.ts updated. Commit 74f2451.
World geometry constants + tileWorldRect added; 4 vitest cases green (clock px preserved, bottom-right placement, world > viewport)

Board rewritten as native-scroll pannable canvas with windowing; verified live: world 2714x3946, opens clock-centered, 0 tiles mounted at empty corner / 9 at cluster, faint grid backdrop, bezel+letterbox removed

Zoom added: scale-in-sizer keeps native scroll extent tracking zoom; pinch + buttons + ctrl/cmd-wheel, focal-point stable, default zoom 1, clamp 0.4-2. Verified live: zoom-out to 0.694 shows full cluster, sizer 1885px, windowing intact

Modal verified full-viewport over the canvas (1440x900@0,0); Storybook decorator intact (uses BOARD_W/H/tilePixelSize). Refinements: FPS readout top-right, zoom removed (locked 1:1), overscroll-behavior none, grid redrawn as cell-boxes that line up perfectly with tiles (proven: 0px edge error across all 9 tiles + screenshot)

Pannable + zoomable canvas board shipped: 48x48 world, native-scroll pan + windowing, clock-centered, aligned faint grid, FPS readout, zoom locked 1:1, no overscroll. All milestones closed, gates green (633 tests), browser-verified.
ac_gates verification passed: bun run test (633 tests), bun run typecheck (4 workspaces), bunx biome check . all exit 0

Renamed live Portainer env (endpoint 3) from 'local' to 'production' via API; added idempotent scripts/rename-portainer-env.sh wired into bootstrap.sh so fresh boxes get the same name; updated deployment-design.md. Verified: GET /api/endpoints shows 'production', rename script no-ops idempotently, shellcheck clean.

bootstrap.sh now single-shot self-contained: fail-fast secret guard, swarm init, portainer service publishing host-local :9000, API readiness wait (local->public fallback), programmatic admin init from 1Password (409/already-init is graceful), env rename to production, GHCR check, bosun up. Validated against live box: URL fallback resolves to public, admin/init returns 409 handled, auth+rename idempotent. shellcheck clean on both scripts. Docs updated.
Fixed by www-6cq (cloudflared --token-file). Verified: cloudflared 1/1, dashboard 200, bosun up idempotent.
Fixed by www-11c (renderStackYml emits named volumes; postgres pinned to cc_pgdata). Verified live: postgres has cc_pgdata mount.

Auto-deploy works end-to-end. Built the missing receiver: bosun-agent service (serve.ts /deploy/<stack> handler), webhook token in 1Password+GH secret, live CF route client (createRoute/deleteRoute), $ escape in renderStackYml, GHCR login in the agent so deploys can pull. Wired CF hooks. -> bosun-agent:4202 (removed stale hooks-test) + created the hooks CNAME. VERIFIED: push 1f12d8b -> CI deploy job 2xx (run 26975894529 deploy=success) -> agent bosun up auto-rolled control-center_api 217eca0d->54116457 with zero manual docker commands; dashboard 200 throughout. Note: a bad bootstrap bosun up briefly broke prod (render was never validated); recovered, postgres now on a persistent volume. Residuals filed: DNS-record automation in routes sync, agent verify noise; www-chy rescoped to POSTGRES_DB-on-fresh-volume.

Self-hosted latin woff2 under public/fonts; @font-face now font-display: block (was swap); index.html preloads grotesk + mono-400. Verified: bun typecheck + build green, bundled CSS has 0 font-display:swap / 3 block, dist/fonts + 2 preload links present. The swap was the flash; block+preload removes it.

Delivered in ca3092a (committed under www-xf1 by a concurrent session on the shared working tree). Verified at HEAD: Modal createPortal→document.body, brightness moved to top as 'Lamp brightness' with thick .range-lg track. 800 tests green.

Centralized 'any modal open' in a ref-counted store (modal-open-store.ts); shared Modal registers while open; Board freezes pan on it (OR'd with activeModal). Verified in-browser on local dev: Controls>More now sets #stage overflow:hidden/touchAction:none, mouse-drag + wheel behind it leave scroll unchanged; closing restores panning; activeModal path + variant switcher unaffected. 804 tests + typecheck + biome green.

Migration complete: created fresh PUBLIC 0x63616c/control-center from rewritten clean history (275 commits, 0 PRs, no pull/dolt refs, zero literal address — guard pattern base64-encoded). Renamed old repo to control-center-private and DELETED it. Re-pointed origin, re-added BOSUN_WEBHOOK_TOKEN, wired GHCR auth via write:packages PAT (packages stay private), added workflow_dispatch. Verified: full build+push+deploy succeeds on public repo (run 27031403353); prod healthy (all endpoints 200, all service logs clean post-rollout); HOME_* from 1Password confirmed live in prod.

control-center is PUBLIC with zero leaked info: clean history, 0 PRs, no address anywhere, packages private. Free unlimited Actions minutes now (the original 2000-min driver). Blocker www-d3j resolved via fresh-repo migration. beads Dolt no longer synced to the public remote (kept local).
